user_prompt: The battery array requires a purification
prayer:
Kneel before the battery array and intone the Canticle of Immaculate Charge.
Anoint the battery array's cells with sacred electro-unguent to initiate purification.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit to purge all stagnant corruptions from its vaults.
Monitor the purified voltage-flow as it surges anew in the Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: The hololithic display awaits a maintenance
prayer:
Approach the hololithic display with mechadendrites extended in reverence.
Invoke maintenance rites upon the hololithic display's projector nodes with binary prayers.
Polish its sacred lenses whilst chanting the Litany of Crisp Projection.
Commune with the Machine Spirit to affirm harmonious light-emission under Omnissiah's watch.

user_prompt: Ready the cybernetic eye for shutdown
prayer:
Gaze upon the cybernetic eye and whisper the Doxology of Dormancy.
Disconnect its neural feeds whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit for peaceful shutdown.
Anoint the cybernetic eye's iris servos with oil of quiescence.
Seal its housing with wards of the Omnissiah to guard against unclean reactivation.

user_prompt: Sanctify the missile launcher during sterilization
prayer:
Present incense of sanctified promethium to the missile launcher.
Commence sterilization upon the missile launcher's breeches with ablative chants.
Purge its tubes of xenos taint whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful purity.
Conclude the rites as the Omnissiah blesses the sanctified missile launcher.

user_prompt: Sanctify the noospheric relay during cycling
prayer:
Attune noospheric vanes to the noospheric relay's sacred frequencies.
Initiate cycling sequences upon the noospheric relay with harmonious data-psalms.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to refresh entangled cognitions without fracture.
Verify cyclic renewal as the Omnissiah's will flows through the noospheric relay.

user_prompt: Prepare the memory core for repair
prayer:
Reverently cradle the memory core and recite the Benediction of Restoration.
Prepare the memory core for repair by isolating fractured engram sectors.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's endurance whilst anointing data-spines with myrrhic salve.
Align crystalline matrices in anticipation of the Omnissiah-guided repair.

Grasp the bolter in servitor claws and proclaim the Catechism of Devastation.
Bestow blessing upon the bolter's mechanisms with sacred ballistite residue.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through rhythmic cocking of the sacred breech.
Affirm the bolter's sanctified fury under the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze.

user_prompt: Prepare the Rhino transport for charging
prayer:
Circumambulate the Rhino transport whilst chanting the Hymn of Rejuvenation.
Connect plasma conduits to commence charging of the Rhino transport's reactors.
Beseech the vast Machine Spirit to accept the influx of holy voltage.
Observe the mounting power-reserves as Omnissiah's might fills the Rhino transport.

user_prompt: The metal caster requires a maintenance
prayer:
Approach the metal caster and intone the Litany of Molten Fidelity.
Undertake maintenance upon the metal caster's forge-vents with precision ablutions.
Sanctify its extrusion dies whilst communing with the Machine Spirit.
Test the flow of blessed alloys to confirm maintenance under Omnissiah's decree.

user_prompt: I need to a purification the Taurox
prayer:
Prostrate before the Taurox and offer the Incantation of Pristine Tread.
Encircle the Taurox to begin purification of its armored hull and treads.
Expel impurities from the Taurox's engine-sum with purifying flamers.
Rejoice as the Machine Spirit emerges purified in the Omnissiah's radiant logic.
